title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Elior India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Elior India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Elior India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Mysuru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Elior India:
Elior India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Elior India!
